unity_mcp.menu_item_executed: Escape From Nightmares/Seed Title UI Prefab
unity_mcp.log_confirmation: Seeded TitleUI prefab and Stage1 scene instance.

batchmode.blocked_reason: Unity project lock was held by an open editor instance, so BatchMode exited with return code 1 before executing the seeder. Unity MCP was used afterward.

known_gaps: Full title scene or boot/title scene flow is not implemented yet.
Pause, puzzle, hiding, and game-over UI prefabs are still not created.
Room-specific item pickup hotspots are not placed yet.
Puzzle, monster, hiding, and sound gameplay systems are still deferred.

recommended_next_unit.scope: Create the pause UI prefab with Continue, Settings, and Return to Title before pause flow wiring.
